reason: Backend changes (create endpoint, convert-only mode, sources-list endpoint) must meet backend quality bar
Create-workspace failures, convert errors, and job errors must follow error-handling conventions
New Electron main/preload code (data-dir resolution, registry, IPC) must meet electron quality bar

Workspace management UI + per-document action buttons/status badges must follow UI guidelines
Verify write-boundary isolation (translate vs wiki), relative-path convention, no FE path-construction regressions; two-place import-suffix sync preserved
Verify atomic writes, idempotency keys for register mode, and that read-only endpoints still don't auto-create workspaces
Verify new IPC channels are validated and the removed open-folder dialog leaves no insecure surface
Verify registered-but-unbuilt docs are listed and status (registered/wikiBuilt/translated) is correct
Verify import spends zero LLM tokens (register-only) and Build Wiki still works on registered sources
